历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 1732 → 1976 → 4199 → 2688 → 2672. In 2023, due to batch merging and other factors, the ranking significantly dropped to 4199, then notably improved to 2688 in 2024, and remained essentially stable at 2672 in 2025, stabilizing in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 2672 for 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Yunnan Province was 20 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 27 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 24, a reduction of about 11.1% compared to 2025, the first decrease in nearly 6 years, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 29th (Top 30) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to top-tier normal universities in China, with an extremely high level; in the 2026 reputation cycle, there are no obvious negative public opinion incidents; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 28th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high application attention. No historical record of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Statistics A+, Software Engineering A, Mathematics A, Psychology A, Ecology A, Physics A-, etc., directly related to Physics Category enrollment majors, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's Physics Category enrollment majors include software engineering, computer science and technology, data science, statistics, microelectronics, and other currently hot engineering directions, with overall major popularity being relatively hot; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Yunnan Province college entrance examination is approximately 377,900, with an estimated 229,000 Physics Category candidates based on recent proportions, an increase of about 32.2% compared to 2025, and the significant growth in candidate numbers will push up competition intensity; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city 985 university, with strong regional attraction for Yunnan candidates; the university enrolls 24 students in Physics Category in Yunnan, which, although more than the History Category, is still scarce overall.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the three factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 2672, the 11.1% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, and the approximately 32.2% increase in Yunnan Physics Category candidates, competition has significantly intensified. Considering the surge in candidate numbers, the university's high reputation, and the popularity of hot engineering majors, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 2544, with a range of 2254–2834.
